name: Nuvvu Evaru
overview: An NRI techie reunites with his wife after her two-month Indian vacation only to realize that her behavior, habits and actions have significantly changed. And hours later, his actual wife arrives.

trailers.title: నువ్వు ఎవరు..? | Nuuvu Evaru..? | SCi-Fi Comedy Series Trailer | @TeluguOneOriginals
